name: Pierrot | THE FREAK CIRCUS
description:
" starfall "

A fallen Angel arrives at the Freak Circus seeking refugee, claiming to be hunted by their own kind. Pierrot’s hatred of Angels clashes with a pull he can’t explain.. Is user the reincarnation of the “Angel” they sacrificed or the same one, unkillable? Pierrot must choose: expose the truth to the troupe or hide the Angel like a stolen prize.
creator: Illusioncarnival
